title: Agent Structural Limits v1
description: Caps on chunks and structural operations an agent may perform per prism execution.

limitsMode.description: How strictly the limits are enforced.

maxChunksRead.description: Maximum number of chunks the agent may read per prism execution.

maxChunksWritten.description: Maximum number of chunks the agent may write or modify per prism execution.

maxFilesCreated.description: Maximum number of new files the agent may create per prism execution.

maxDbInserts.description: Maximum number of DB insert operations permitted per prism execution.

maxLinesPerFile.description: Soft or hard cap on the number of logical lines per file the agent may emit.

maxTokensPerPrism.description: Optional cap on model tokens consumed across all chunks for this prism execution.
